title: 构建后服务出现异常外联和敏感接口探测
GitHub Token 权限过宽
recommendation: 按 workflow/job 最小化声明权限，例如 contents: read；发布任务只授予必要写权限。
status: 按 workflow/job 最小化声明权限，例如 contents: read；发布任务只授予必要写权限。

title: zizmor: unpinned-uses
recommendation: 参考 zizmor 审计 https://docs.zizmor.sh/audits/#unpinned-uses 修复该 GitHub Actions 风险。
status: 参考 zizmor 审计 https://docs.zizmor.sh/audits/#unpinned-uses 修复该 GitHub Actions 风险。

title: Action 未固定到完整 commit SHA
recommendation: 在高安全流程中使用 40 位完整 commit SHA；普通流程至少固定可信 tag 并启用变更审查。
status: 在高安全流程中使用 40 位完整 commit SHA；普通流程至少固定可信 tag 并启用变更审查。

title: axios has exploitable VEX context
recommendation: Treat as exploitable in this product context: update or mitigate, verify exposed routes, and review matching runtime logs.
status: Treat as exploitable in this product context: update or mitigate, verify exposed routes, and review matching runtime logs.

title: electron matched OSV vulnerabilities
recommendation: VEX marks this dependency vulnerability as not affected in the scanned context; keep the statement current when imports, routes, or logs change.
status: VEX marks this dependency vulnerability as not affected in the scanned context; keep the statement current when imports, routes, or logs change.
